name: GitHub Push
description: Triggered when code is pushed to the main branch
prompt: A new push was made to the main branch. Review the changes and provide a brief summary of what was changed and any potential issues.

name: New Issue
description: Triggered when a new GitHub issue is opened
prompt: A new GitHub issue has been opened. Analyze the issue, categorize it (bug, feature request, question), and draft an initial response acknowledging receipt and providing any immediate guidance.
